news.title:
Power Grid Corp reported an NSE block trade worth Rs. 58.8 crore.
The trade involved ~1,960,871 shares at Rs. 299.8 per share.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp reported an NSE block trade worth Rs. 58.8 crore.
The trade involved ~1,960,871 shares at Rs. 299.8 per share.

news.title:
Adani Energy, NTPC, and Tata Power face mixed Q4 performance; PL Capital favors NTPC, Power Grid, and CESC.
PL Capital notes stable demand, moderated prices, and renewable energy's role; below-normal monsoon could boost demand.
news.summary:
Adani Energy, NTPC, and Tata Power face mixed Q4 performance; PL Capital favors NTPC, Power Grid, and CESC.
PL Capital notes stable demand, moderated prices, and renewable energy's role; below-normal monsoon could boost demand.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp's P/E at 17.7 vs industry's 21.7 highlights valuation advantage.
Market cap exceeds ₹2.7L cr; Mojo Grade upgraded to Hold, boosting investment appeal.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp's P/E at 17.7 vs industry's 21.7 highlights valuation advantage.
Market cap exceeds ₹2.7L cr; Mojo Grade upgraded to Hold, boosting investment appeal.

news.title:
POWERGRID wins TBCB bid for Tumkur II transmission project in Karnataka.
The project includes 400 kV double circuit line and supports 2.7 GW renewable energy.
news.summary:
POWERGRID wins TBCB bid for Tumkur II transmission project in Karnataka.
The project includes 400 kV double circuit line and supports 2.7 GW renewable energy.

news.title:
Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd conducted an investor webinar sharing updates on business performance and future plans, including projections for capex and capitalization up to FY28.
The company announced FY26 capex of ₹35,000 crore, discussed future projects worth ₹15 lakh crore by 2035, and detailed ongoing efforts to address execution challenges like skilled manpower and equipment supply.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd conducted an investor webinar sharing updates on business performance and future plans, including projections for capex and capitalization up to FY28.
The company announced FY26 capex of ₹35,000 crore, discussed future projects worth ₹15 lakh crore by 2035, and detailed ongoing efforts to address execution challenges like skilled manpower and equipment supply.

news.title: PowerGrid appoints Burra Vamsi Rama Mohan as Chairman & MD effective today.
news.summary: PowerGrid appoints Burra Vamsi Rama Mohan as Chairman & MD effective today.

news.title:
Power Grid's Executive Directors Ashwani Kumar Gupta and Jasbir Singh retired on March 31, 2026.
The cessation was due to superannuation; no new appointments disclosed per SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Power Grid's Executive Directors Ashwani Kumar Gupta and Jasbir Singh retired on March 31, 2026.
The cessation was due to superannuation; no new appointments disclosed per SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
Nifty drops below 22,400 as 46 stocks decline; Sensex falls 1,500 points.
PowerGrid is the only stock trading higher; NSE advance-decline ratio at 1:6.
news.summary:
Nifty drops below 22,400 as 46 stocks decline; Sensex falls 1,500 points.
PowerGrid is the only stock trading higher; NSE advance-decline ratio at 1:6.

news.title:
Power Grid commissioned transmission for Arun 3 HEP (900 MW) in Nepal's Indian portion.
The system, operational from 03.09.2023, boosts cross-border power evacuation capacity.
news.summary:
Power Grid commissioned transmission for Arun 3 HEP (900 MW) in Nepal's Indian portion.
The system, operational from 03.09.2023, boosts cross-border power evacuation capacity.

news.title:
Power Grid held a webinar on 23rd March 2026, updating analysts and investors on its business.
Links to video and audio recordings of the webinar have been provided as per SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Power Grid held a webinar on 23rd March 2026, updating analysts and investors on its business.
Links to video and audio recordings of the webinar have been provided as per SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.

news.title:
JPMorgan rates Power Grid Corp Overweight with Rs 319 target citing improved execution.
Strong RoE and defensive model noted, but FY26 guidance upgrade remains modest with no major FY27–28 changes.
news.summary:
JPMorgan rates Power Grid Corp Overweight with Rs 319 target citing improved execution.
Strong RoE and defensive model noted, but FY26 guidance upgrade remains modest with no major FY27–28 changes.

news.title:
Elara Capital gives Buy on Power Grid with Rs 360 target, citing FY26 capex of Rs 350bn.
Strong Rs 15tn project pipeline, Rs 1.5tn order book and Rs 490bn CWIP boost growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital gives Buy on Power Grid with Rs 360 target, citing FY26 capex of Rs 350bn.
Strong Rs 15tn project pipeline, Rs 1.5tn order book and Rs 490bn CWIP boost growth visibility.

news.title:
MOSL rates Power Grid neutral with Rs 302 target; FY26 capex/capitalisation guidance rises to Rs 350bn/250bn.
FY27/28 forecasts unchanged; growth contingent on securing new project wins.
news.summary:
MOSL rates Power Grid neutral with Rs 302 target; FY26 capex/capitalisation guidance rises to Rs 350bn/250bn.
FY27/28 forecasts unchanged; growth contingent on securing new project wins.

news.title:
CERC directs RECPDCL to reimburse acquisition cost paid by PGCIL for the Vemagiri Transmission System SPV.
CERC criticized RECPDCL for not deferring the process despite force majeure; liability placed on RECPDCL over PGCIL.
news.summary:
CERC directs RECPDCL to reimburse acquisition cost paid by PGCIL for the Vemagiri Transmission System SPV.
CERC criticized RECPDCL for not deferring the process despite force majeure; liability placed on RECPDCL over PGCIL.

news.title:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp raises FY26 CAPEX guidance to ₹350B from ₹320B.
FY26 capitalization guidance also increased to ₹250B from ₹220B.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp raises FY26 CAPEX guidance to ₹350B from ₹320B.
FY26 capitalization guidance also increased to ₹250B from ₹220B.

news.title:
Power Grid held a webinar on Mar 23, 2026, discussing growth, financials, and execution.
Capex plan exceeds ₹1L Cr; transmission expansion supports India's green energy goals.
news.summary:
Power Grid held a webinar on Mar 23, 2026, discussing growth, financials, and execution.
Capex plan exceeds ₹1L Cr; transmission expansion supports India's green energy goals.

news.title:
BofA Securities turns bullish on utilities, upgrading Power Grid, NTPC, and NHPC to 'Buy'.
The upgrade reflects positive sentiment towards the utilities sector, as reported by CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
BofA Securities turns bullish on utilities, upgrading Power Grid, NTPC, and NHPC to 'Buy'.
The upgrade reflects positive sentiment towards the utilities sector, as reported by CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Power Grid shares rose 2.7% after board approved merging 28 subsidiaries to streamline operations.
Q3FY25 profit dropped 4.1% YoY; board approved ₹705.3cr investment in transformers, reactors.
news.summary:
Power Grid shares rose 2.7% after board approved merging 28 subsidiaries to streamline operations.
Q3FY25 profit dropped 4.1% YoY; board approved ₹705.3cr investment in transformers, reactors.
